chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1451 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 21.11.2016. Mr. Nouman Sahito, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sheeraz Ahmed Bhatti, Advocate for private respondents. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. Today, under the statement Counsel for private respondents has filed a judgment dated 28.10.2015 passed in F.C.S No.559 of 2011, which was earlier instituted by Moulana Ghulamullah s/o Pathan Khan, who is father of present petitioner. According to Counsel for respondents, the subject matter in both cases is same and the earlier suit was dismissed by the concerned Court of 6th Senior Civil Judge, Hyderabad. This fact has not been mentioned in the present petition. It appears that even otherwise the dispute between the parties, if any, is of civil nature and private respondents today present in person have undertaken not to take law in their hands and if they have any grievance they will seek remedy by due process of law. With these observation instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
